title: Oil prices soar amid worries of sustained war in Iran
author: Evan Halper, Rachel Siegel
fullText: The war in the Mideast has effectively halted shipping through the Strait of Hormuz, threatening to push up gas prices and raise the cost of other goods.
summary: The war in the Mideast has effectively halted shipping through the Strait of Hormuz, threatening to push up gas prices and raise the cost of other goods.
